description: Conduct regulatory research using the official FDA 510(k) Premarket Notification database (accessdata.fda.gov). Identify 3 distinct devices with Product Code 'DQA' (Pulse Oximeters) cleared between January 1, 2024, and December 31, 2024. Download the '510(k) Summary' PDF for each device and save them to /home/ga/Documents/FDA_Research/ renamed as their K-Number (e.g., K240123.pdf). Create a log file at /home/ga/Documents/FDA_Research/clearance_log.txt containing a line for each device in the format: 'K-Number | Applicant Name | Decision Date'.
